title: BEM-866 analyze latest Claude report
objective:
Run script:
"""
report = Path('governance/reports/bem865_claude_write_selftest.md')
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
report_text = report.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if report.exists() else ''
response_text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
low = report_text.lower()
ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in [line.strip() for line in response_text.splitlines()]
if ok:
    status = 'MAILBOX_WRITE_CONFIRMED'
elif not report.exists():
    status = 'REPORT_MISSING'
elif 'changed_files: none' in low or 'changed files: none' in low:
    status = 'REPORT_CHANGED_FILES_NONE'
elif 'bem865_claude_write_selftest_response' in low and 'claude_write_ok' in low:
    status = 'REPORT_HAS_MAILBOX_TOKEN'
elif 'success' in low:
    status = 'REPORT_SUCCESS_NO_MAILBOX'
else:
    status = 'REPORT_UNCLEAR'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_LATEST_CLAUDE_REPORT_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 latest Claude report analysis\nStatus: ' + status + '\nReport exists: ' + str(report.exists()) + '\nMailbox OK: ' + str(ok) + '\n\nReport text:\n' + report_text[:4000] + '\n\nMailbox text:\n' + response_text[:2000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('latest Claude report analysis: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
